placeholders.original_text: assert((kv + 1) * nv == kv * nv + nv) by (nonlinear_arith);

assert forall|k2: int| 0 <= k2 < k implies !(valid_k(a_int, k2) && awruk_wins(a_int, k2)) by { if k2 < m { let j = choose|j: int| 0 <= j < a@.len() && m == #[trigger] a@[j]; seq_to_int_index(a@, j); assert(a_int[j] > k2); assert(!valid_k(a_int, k2)); } else { assert(#[trigger] (k2 * (a@.len() as int)) - (s as int) <= (s as int)); assert(k2 * a_int.len() - sum(a_int) <= sum(a_int)); assert(!awruk_wins(a_int, k2)); } };
